meta_title: For Students: passive income to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Passive Income for Students: Advanced AI Build Checklist
content.seo_description: Overcome project block with this advanced checklist. Learn to build passive income SaaS apps using Antigravity and Claude Code as a student developer.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for inspiration. Leverage AI-driven automation to build micro-SaaS tools that solve specific, high-intent problems. By using Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you can deploy functional, revenue-generating prototypes in days, transforming your student portfolio into a recurring passive income engine.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank IDE, the cursor blinking like a metronome counting down your wasted potential. The 'no project ideas' paralysis isn't a lack of creativity; it's a lack of a framework. You are trying to build the next Facebook when you should be building the next utility that people pay $9/month to solve a minor, annoying friction point.

This isn't about busy work. It’s about leveraging the new stack—Antigravity and Claude Code—to bypass the boilerplate and get straight to the value layer. We are going to turn your technical curiosity into a recurring revenue stream, one production-ready micro-app at a time.

steps.title: Niche Market Identification
steps.description: Scout subreddits and indie hacker forums for 'how do I' questions. Focus on manual workflows that can be automated via API.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following list of user complaints from niche forums and identify 3 high-frequency pain points that can be solved with a browser-based micro-SaaS tool.

steps.title: Rapid Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a production-ready boilerplate that includes Stripe integration and authentication out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a SaaS boilerplate with Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe Connect. Ensure the architecture is modular for rapid feature iteration.

steps.title: Logic Layer Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write the core business logic. Focus on clean, testable functions that handle the primary automation task.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a service layer that processes user input, interacts with the OpenAI API, and saves the result to Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'implement service layer with zod validation and error handling'

steps.title: Integration Testing
steps.description: Automate your testing suite to ensure the passive income loop doesn't break when dependencies update.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of integration tests covering the Stripe checkout flow and the core AI generation logic.

steps.title: Deployment and Feedback Loop
steps.description: Deploy to Vercel and set up observability to monitor usage patterns for future iterations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a CI/CD pipeline that deploys to Vercel and sends usage logs to an external dashboard.

pro_tips: Prioritize 'boring' problems—B2B micro-tasks are far easier to monetize than consumer entertainment apps.
Ship the MVP in 48 hours; if you aren't embarrassed by your first version, you spent too much time on design.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to maintain consistent coding standards across multiple micro-projects.
Implement a 'kill switch' for your AI costs to prevent runaway API bills during the testing phase.
Focus on SEO-first development—ensure your landing page metadata is generated dynamically based on the specific problem you solve.
content.next_steps: Once your first app is live, spend 30 minutes a day on 'distribution'—posting your link where your target users hang out. Repeat this cycle until you have three apps earning consistent monthly recurring revenue.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for your resume and start building for your freedom. You have the tools, the strategy, and the path forward. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
